description: Project bootstrapping and development workflow framework

commands.note: All commands synced everywhere. Project-specific go in commands/project/

skills.note: Only skills matching project's tech_stack in framework-manifest.json

rules/visuals.md.description: Rule: Use Nano Banana for diagrams instead of ASCII art

skills/next-js/next.js - SKILL.md.description: Next.js 14+ core patterns and App Router usage

skills/next-js/next.js - patterns.md.description: Next.js architectural patterns and best practices

skills/supabase/supabase - SKILL.md.description: Supabase core patterns for auth and database

docs/_SKILL-GENERATION-PROMPT.md.description: Template prompt for generating new skills

docs/_SKILL-FRESHNESS-CHECK.md.description: Process for checking if skills are outdated

changes: MAJOR: Consolidated all repos into HLV as single source of truth
MAJOR: Archived claude-workflow-commands and claude-skills repos
Added auto-sync to /wrapup - commands/skills pushed to HLV automatically
Added interactive category selection to /system-upgrade-pull
Added smart skill filtering by project tech_stack
Deprecated /skills-push (merged into /wrapup)
Deprecated /skills-pull (merged into /system-upgrade-pull)
Made /system-upgrade-push fully automated (no copy step)
Added sync_architecture section to framework-manifest.json
Added commands/project/ to protected_paths
Updated ~/.claude/system-config.json to point to HLV
Added visuals.md rule - use Nano Banana for diagrams instead of ASCII art
Generated actual image diagrams for CHEAT-SHEET (data-flow, workflow)
Added docs/images/ to syncable files
Consolidated 6 initial setup steps to 4 (merged analyze+skills, checkpoint+build-order)
Created /skills-pull command for pulling tech skills from central repository
Created /skills-push command for pushing tech skills to central repository
Improved CHEAT-SHEET with detailed explanations and data flow diagram
Added 'What it does NOT do' sections to clarify command boundaries
Updated CLAUDE.md with new 4-step workflow and skills management section
Protected settings.json from sync - each project keeps its own MCP permissions
Added CHEAT-SHEET.md to syncable_files - can now update command reference in old projects
Renamed /system-upgrade to /system-upgrade-pull for clarity
Renamed /system-note to /system-upgrade-push with enhanced context scanning
Added git init to /new-project - projects now start with git repository
Added workflow-log creation to /new-project
Added structure verification to /pre-flight-check and /wrapup
Fixed stale command references across all documentation
Split /audit-workflow into two separate commands
Added /codebase-workflow-audit for technical consistency checks
Added /customer-journey-workflow-audit for user experience validation
Updated CHEAT-SHEET.md, CLAUDE.md, and _SYSTEM-AUDIT-PROMPT.md
Renamed /initiate-system to /pre-flight-check
Implemented real MD5 checksums for all syncable files
Enable /system-upgrade to detect actual file changes
Audit: Deleted orphan initial-setup-step5-project-start.md
Audit: Updated all /update-log references to /wrapup
Audit: Added /audit-workflow to CHEAT-SHEET.md
Audit: Updated Complete Workflow Reference to 6-step process
Fixed: Changelog now correctly documents command renames
Added git_url and source_type fields for git-based sync
Renamed /sync-framework and /skill-sync to /system-upgrade
Added /slash-command-upgrade for command updates from repo
Added template_files section for docs/_*.md files
Initial framework release
Added Next.js 14+ skills
Added Supabase skills
Added TailwindCSS skills
MCP support for Meta Ads and nano-banana
Added syncable_files and protected_paths for safe syncing
